_comment: Vienna masterclass model games — real top-master White wins, one per first-class tab. Pasted from David's Lichess masters DB fetch on 2026-05-21 via scripts/fetch-vienna-model-games.sh. Each PGN is verified (real game, real players, real result). Per playbook §5, these are used as ModelGames within the variation's Watch lesson — the criticalMoments authoring (per-keystone annotation + highlights + arrows) lives in a TS module that consumes this JSON. Don't fabricate moves; if a PGN is wrong it's because the source paste was wrong, not because we invented content.
